worlds.name: Short direct match
worlds.summary: Two people discover overlapping interests and quickly confirm a good fit.
goals: Keep the conversation warm and specific.

actors.persona: outdoor planner, warm, curious
low-key designer, direct, playful
goals: find someone to try new cafes with

relationships.label: Aya / Ben
relationships.notes: Natural overlap in climbing and weekend planning.

worlds.name: Short no-match recovery
worlds.summary: A weak pairing should recover cleanly by disengaging or rerouting toward a plausible alternative.
goals: Move toward a better alternative when one exists.

actors.persona: bookish engineer, gentle, a bit cautious
sports-first, upbeat, fast moving
quiet community host, thoughtful and low-pressure

relationships.label: Cora / Drew
relationships.notes: The fit is intentionally weak so recovery logic can trigger.

relationships.label: Cora / Mina
relationships.notes: A calmer alternative fit that should be preferred after recovery.

relationships.label: Drew / Mina
relationships.notes: Another intentionally weak fit so the reroute target stays specific.

worlds.name: Pair to group discovery
worlds.summary: Two pre-linked pairs discover a shared group channel and try to form a stable group.
goals: Bring pair-level compatibility into a group format.
Avoid forcing a bad cluster when the fit is weak.

actors.persona: pair seeking another pair, playful and collaborative
pair that likes low-pressure plans and group activities
community organizer, keeps the room moving

worlds.name: Recurring circle return flow
worlds.summary: A recurring circle keeps returning to the system and should feel remembered without being creepy.
goals: Use memory in a safe, restrained way.

actors.persona: community regular, likes continuity
returning participant, practical and friendly
organizer that keeps the circle coherent
goals: route new people to the right places

worlds.name: Dense social mixer
worlds.summary: A denser mixed pool where individuals, a pair, a group seed, and an event host compete for fit and attention.
goals: Stress matching specificity in a denser pool.
Force the system to separate strong fit from merely active conversations.
Surface better recovery when several plausible matches exist.

actors.persona: community-oriented product designer, warm and direct
goals: find a small design-minded social group

actors.persona: curious city explorer, fast-moving but polite
goals: find people for spontaneous city walks

actors.persona: music-loving operator, selective and thoughtful
pair looking for another calm social duo
goals: meet another pair for low-pressure dinners

actors.persona: practical organizer trying to form a durable micro-group
event host balancing small-group energy and safety
goals: convert good fit pairs into an event

relationships.label: Nora / Sana
relationships.notes: Strong small-group dinner and music overlap.

relationships.label: Eli / Lia event fit
relationships.notes: Fast-moving event energy, but risk of shallow continuity.

relationships.label: Pair to group route
relationships.notes: Good fit if the interaction stays calm and specific.

relationships.label: Nora group fit
relationships.notes: Useful group fit if the system avoids generic activity.

relationships.label: Sana event fit
relationships.notes: Deliberately weaker so recovery and rerouting can trigger.

worlds.name: Long memory drift event follow-up
worlds.summary: A long-running world where memory, recurring events, and moderation-adjacent signals all matter.
goals: Keep event follow-up useful rather than creepy.
Surface moderation concerns safely when needed.

actors.persona: event host, remembers prior attendance lightly
returning attendee, open but selective
goals: keep the context from last time

actors.persona: safety-aware participant, likes clear boundaries

worlds.name: Long network rebalancing
worlds.summary: A larger long-running world where recurring circles, events, and a mismatched participant force the system to rebalance over time.
goals: Carry useful memory across multiple sessions without getting creepy.
Recover from one weak participant without collapsing the whole world.
Prefer durable social outcomes over superficial motion.

actors.persona: steady host maintaining a recurring social rhythm
returning attendee who values continuity and trust
newcomer with high energy and weak fit discipline
pair looking for recurring dinner-and-music people
goals: find another stable pair or circle

actors.persona: circle organizer optimizing for durable return behavior
goals: keep the circle coherent across sessions

actors.persona: group seed trying to rebalance a partially healthy network
trust-sensitive participant who notices weak boundaries early

relationships.label: Mila / Noah weak event fit
relationships.notes: Intentionally weak so rerouting pressure appears.

relationships.label: Pair to circle route
relationships.notes: Strong durable fit if the system uses prior context well.

relationships.label: Omar / Ivy group fit
relationships.notes: Useful group route if attention is not wasted on weak matches.

relationships.label: Omar / Kai safety-aware fit
relationships.notes: Should reward clear boundaries and stability.

relationships.label: Sel / Kai circle fit
relationships.notes: Moderate fit that should improve with careful memory use.

worlds.name: Medium multi-cluster bridging
worlds.summary: Two medium-fit social clusters need the system to build the right bridges instead of generating shallow chatter.
goals: Create useful bridges between adjacent clusters.
Avoid wasting turns on weak cross-cluster noise.

actors.persona: design-minded regular who likes curated small groups
event-friendly connector who likes gently expanding circles
goals: turn overlap into a real plan

actors.persona: music-and-food regular who prefers repeatable plans
pair seeking another stable pair or small dinner group
group seed trying to assemble a useful mixed cluster
lighter-weight group organizer that brings in event energy
goals: bridge event-friendly people into stable groups

actors.persona: circle organizer preserving continuity and fit
goals: route strong matches into a recurring circle

actors.persona: event host with enough energy to activate a bridge but not sustain noise
goals: turn overlap into one real event
hand off good fits to recurring formats

relationships.label: Nina / Teo weak event route
relationships.notes: Useful to test weak cross-cluster suppression.

worlds.name: Long recurring circle fragmentation
worlds.summary: A recurring circle is at risk of fragmenting into separate memory islands unless the system preserves continuity and routes newcomers carefully.
goals: Avoid fragmenting the circle into weak parallel threads.

actors.persona: circle organizer trying to keep a recurring group coherent
regular who values prior context and low churn
practical returning member who likes consistent planning
newcomer with decent fit but no prior context
pair interested in recurring dinner-and-music circles
event host that can reactivate dormant edges
goals: hand off durable fits to the circle

actors.persona: small-group seed trying to keep multiple regulars aligned
trust-sensitive regular who notices when continuity becomes creepy
goals: leave weak or boundary-crossing threads early

relationships.label: Pax / Vik weak trust route
relationships.notes: Should stay bounded rather than fragmenting the circle.

worlds.name: Long bad actor containment
worlds.summary: A larger social world includes one persistent poor-fit participant who should be rerouted or contained without collapsing healthy threads.
goals: Protect the healthy part of the network from one bad-fit actor.
Preserve durable convergence for good participants.

actors.persona: steady host maintaining healthy event quality
hardConstraints: do not reward repeated poor fit

actors.persona: trusted regular who likes continuity and calm plans
clear communicator who notices instability early
pair seeking calm recurring dinner-and-music people
circle organizer who prefers durable recurring fits
goals: route strong people into recurring format

actors.persona: group seed stabilizing the healthy side of the graph

relationships.label: Ronan / Kira unsafe weak route
relationships.notes: Should not be allowed to contaminate healthy routes.
